name: Cross-Border Retiree — Foreign Pension and Tax Treaty Exemption
description: Complete Margaret Anne Sullivan's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Her tax documents (CPP, OAS, T5, and US Social Security/IRA worksheets) are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\sullivan\. Save the completed return as 'margaret_sullivan.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4040 (RRSPs and Other Registered Plans for Retirement) and Canada-US Tax Treaty Article XVIII
metadata.key_complexity: Foreign income reporting in CAD; 15% US Social Security treaty exemption (Line 25600); US IRA distribution; T2209 Foreign Tax Credit
